name: producer
description: Producer — Ableton Live production toolkit. Chat-side Claude Code plugin + in-Live Max for Live device.

plugins.name: producer
plugins.description: Producer companion for Ableton Live. Review tracks, brainstorm, write MIDI, design sounds, dial in mixes, prep stems and releases, browse your library, and drive Live directly. Wired into Ableton, Splice, Spotify, Apple Music, Google Drive, Gmail, and Calendar.
